title: Notifications - Update failed OFF
scenario: No failure notification shown when DFU fails due to device power-off during first 20% with Software Update notification setting turned OFF
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to App Settings → General → Notifications & Device Alerts.
3. Locate the "Software Update" notification setting and ensure it is turned OFF.
4. Connect a Poly Bluetooth audio device to the app.
5. Initiate a firmware update (DFU) on the connected device via the app.
6. During the first 20% of the update process, turn off the Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., press and hold the Power button to power it off).
7. Wait for the update process to fail due to the device being turned off.
8. Observe the app for any notification related to the firmware update failure.
expected: No failure notification is shown in the app when the "Software Update" notification setting is OFF.
